Properties.commandText:
SELECT t.id, t.adhaar, t.dob, t.email, t.is_hired, t.is_laptop_requested, t.name, t.pan, t.phone, t.region, t.status, o.id, o.candidate_id, o."CandidateId1", o.document_type_id, o.file_name, o.file_path, o.request_id, o.source, o.status, o.uploaded_at
FROM (
    SELECT c.id, c.adhaar, c.dob, c.email, c.is_hired, c.is_laptop_requested, c.name, c.pan, c.phone, c.region, c.status
    FROM candidates AS c
    WHERE c.id = @__candidatid_0
    LIMIT 1
) AS t
LEFT JOIN onboarding_documents AS o ON t.id = o."CandidateId1"
ORDER BY t.id
